results.rendered_html:
mahallaka 1〉 adj. f. mahallikā alt, hinfällig (von lebenden Wesen und Sachen)  VYUTP. 101 . 178 . 203 . vayaṃ hi jīrṇā vṛddhā mahallakāḥ  SADDH. P. 4,4,a. 10,b . Elephant  BURN. Intr. 360, N. 3 .  Lot. de la b. l. 367. fg.  749. fgg.   SCHIEFNER, Lebensb. 288 (58). 327 (97) .  WASSILJEW 87 .
— 2〉 m. = mahalla  JAṬĀDH. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 3〉 ein grosses Haus  VYUTP. 92 .
— 4〉 f. mahallikā N. pr. einer Tochter Prahlādaʼs  KATHĀS. 45,232 .

results.rendered_html:
mahallaka a. Weak, feeble, old.
— kaḥ
1 A eunuch in a king's harem.
2 A large house, palatial building; (cf Mar. mahāla).
